actionUnits.condition: Manual trigger via test harness is required because 'Spot Light' (fileID: 1887208562) is initially inactive (m_IsActive: 0) and has no Rigidbody/Collider/EventTrigger components. The attached MonoBehaviour (id: 1887208566) maps to script GUID b61f5fbd6df31704b851371ab42625b2 (class ToggleOnOff) exposing public void Toggle(). Call Toggle once to activate, then call again after the trigger duration to revert, covering both on/off states.
